TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dennis_Boyd, title = Dennis_Boyd, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dennis_Boyd} }

S.FORM: Dennis Boyd sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1954, byacing te 5 ru 21 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Virginia, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 79 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1977 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Orleans Jazz. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Dennis Boyd sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1954, byacing te 5 ru 21 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Virginia, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 185 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 79 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1977 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Orleans Jazz. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *ennis~ɕ βoj* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa *irɣinia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu new orleans~ɕ *azz. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
